title: Cooling Mat for Dogs and Cat, Heat Relief Pet Cooling Mat for Crates, Kennels and Beds - Portable and Washable(Pink,40x50cm)
features: Material: This dog cooling mat consists of 3 layers: self-cooling fabric, high-quality cotton and breathable mesh fabric. The front is made of delicate ice silk fibre, which cools effectively, while the back is made of breathable mesh fabric.

Inner layer: The inner layer of the cooling mat for dogs is made of thin, fluffy material that is soft to the touch and improves air circulation. The inner lining contains absorbent cotton, which can strongly absorb urine and unpleasant odours.

Function: This self-cooling dog mat is made of cooling fabric that adjusts the temperature by absorbing heat and gives the skin a cool and comfortable feeling. It can absorb your dog's body heat and relax and soothe him in the hot summer.

Safe: Our pet cooling mat is made of safe and non-irritating fibers, is free of harmful substances and does not require water or electricity. You no longer have to worry about your beloved pet accidentally ingesting the leaking gel and thereby affecting their health.

Portable & Widely Used: The Cooling Mat for Dogs is lightweight and portable, easy to carry and store, ideal for indoor use, travel or outdoor activities. Place the ice silk mat on the floor to make dogs feel cool but not cold. It can also be placed in dog nests, cages, kennels, sofas, beds, etc. It is also perfect as a puppy play mat, feeding pad for dogs, urine mat and incontinence mat for children.
description: Product Description Material The LEZUAN dog cooling mat is made of 3 layers: self-cooling fabric, high-quality cotton and breathable mesh fabric. It uses safe and non-irritating fibres and is lighter, thinner, breathable and comfortable compared to ordinary moisture-proof fabrics, making pet cooling! This cooling mat for dogs is perfect for keeping your pet cool and comfortable in hot weather. Inner layer The inner layer of the self-cooling dog mat is made of thin, fluffy material that is soft to the touch and improves air circulation. The inner lining contains absorbent cotton, which can strongly absorb urine and unpleasant odours. Easy care This Cooling Mat for Dogs is machine washable or can be washed by hand. It retains its shape even after washing. The ice silk fabric on the surface does not attract hair easily and does not form fluff, making it easier to clean. Safe Our cooling Cat Mat is made from safe and non-irritating fibres, is free from harmful substances and requires neither water nor electricity. You no longer have to worry about your beloved pet accidentally ingesting the leaking gel and thereby affecting their health. Portable and Widely Used The pet cooling mat is lightweight and portable, easy to carry and store, and ideal for indoor use, travel, or outdoor activities. Place the dog cooling mat on the floor to keep dogs cool but not cold. It can also be placed in dog nests, crates, kennels, on sofas, beds, etc. It is also perfect as a puppy play mat, dog feeding mat, urine pad, and child incontinence pad. Fabric: 75% Nylon+25% Polyester. Colors: Blue, Grey, Light Blue, Coffee, Pink. 6 sizes available: 30x40cm; 55x70cm; 50x60cm; 55x70cm; 70x100cm; 100x150cm. Our dog mats offer a pleasantly refreshing cooling sensation, but not icy cold. For additional cooling, you can use it together with an air conditioner or fan. Function The pet cooling mat is perfect for keeping your pet cool and comfortable on hot days, but not cold for pets. Simply place the cooling mat on the floor or sofa and let your pet lie on it. Prevent overheating and dehydration in hot, panting dogs that struggle in summer.
